title: Initialize workspace and copy templates
acceptance: workspace模板文件齐全（含 error sinks: QUALITY_GATE/RUN_ERRORS）

title: Draft kickoff questions + seed queries (ideation)
acceptance: DECISIONS含C0问题块；queries.md 含非空关键词（可被后续 idea-brief 重写为多桶检索计划）

title: Idea brief: lock scope/constraints/rubric + multi-query buckets
acceptance: IDEA_BRIEF.md 含 scope/constraints/exclusions/rubric/targets/stop rules/query buckets；queries.md 设定 `draft_profile: idea_finder` 且包含 3-6 个 query buckets + exclusions（可审计、可复跑）

title: HUMAN approve C0 (idea brief)
acceptance: 勾选 DECISIONS.md 的 Approve C0（确认 ideation brief 后才进入检索）

title: Collect candidate papers (multi-route) and normalize metadata
acceptance: papers_raw.jsonl 有足够覆盖（ideation Lite+：建议 >=800；不足则在 retrieval_report.md 说明并回到 queries.md 调整多桶检索）；每条含 title/year/url + 稳定标识（arxiv_id/doi）+ provenance；retrieval_report.md 记录 buckets/exclusions/缺失字段统计

title: Dedupe+rank and produce core set
acceptance: dedup 后池子足够大（建议 >=400）；core_set=100（默认；以 queries.md 的 core_size 为准）；paper_id 唯一且 title 非空

title: Build idea map (taxonomy; 2-level minimum) [NO PROSE]
acceptance: taxonomy 至少 2 层且节点有解释；用于 ideation map（而非论文大纲）

title: Draft C2 focus questions (choose 1-2 clusters)
acceptance: DECISIONS 含 C2 focus 选择提示（基于 taxonomy 列出候选簇；要求写明选择与排除项）

title: HUMAN approve C2 (focus clusters + exclusions)
acceptance: 勾选 DECISIONS.md 的 Approve C2（确认 focus 后才进入机会提炼与 ideation）

title: Write paper notes for core set (evidence substrate) [NO PROSE]
acceptance: core_set 覆盖率 100%；每篇至少 1 条 limitation/failure-mode（避免只产出“更强”点子）；无 TODO/省略号泄漏到 notes

title: Map evidence gaps into an opportunity table [NO PROSE]
acceptance: IDEA_OPPORTUNITY_TABLE.md 为 Markdown 表（>=8 rows）；JSONL sidecar 存在且每行含 cluster/gap/why-now/candidate wedge/evidence pointers；仅使用现有 `paper_id`/notes 证据

title: Expand an operator-diverse Idea Pool
acceptance: IDEA_POOL.md 含 60-90 条 idea cards；覆盖 >=6/8 operator families；每条含 tier/operator/assumption/falsification；Tier-1/2 含 `paper_id` 指针；JSONL sidecar 存在

title: Screen the pool with a table-first scoring pass
acceptance: IDEA_SCREENING_TABLE.md 为 Markdown 表（>=10 rows）；含 novelty/feasibility/evidence/wedge/why-now/decision 列；至少标出 5-7 个 shortlist 候选；JSONL sidecar 存在

title: Curate a research-grade shortlist
acceptance: Final shortlist=5-7；每条含 Why now/Sharp gap/Closest-3/Delta/Non-Delta/Concrete testbed/Minimal artifact/validation/failure criteria/risks/evidence anchors；组合覆盖 >=2-3 簇且 >=2 idea 类型；JSONL sidecar 存在

title: Expand the top-3 into mini proposals
acceptance: IDEA_TOP3_REPORT.md 含 3 个展开条目；每条至少含 Why now/Hypothesis/Concrete testbed/Minimal artifact/Strong positive signal/Interesting negative result/Main confound/Kill criteria

title: Self-loop the ideation bundle to PASS
acceptance: DELIVERABLE_SELFLOOP_TODO.md 为 PASS；机会表/池子/筛选表/shortlist/top-3 报告链路自洽；最终产物可用于真实选题讨论而不只是筛题

title: Contract audit (artifact contract + target_artifacts)
acceptance: CONTRACT_REPORT.md 状态为 PASS（且无 DONE 输出缺失；target_artifacts 缺失=0）
